name: visudo
description: Visudo edits the sudoers file, which defines the users and groups with administrator rights

options.description: Checking existing sudoers file for syntax errors
Set an alternative sudoers file location
Enable quiet mode (syntax error not printed)
Enable strict checking of the sudoers file
Export JSON and write it to output_file
Enforce default mode for the sudoers file
Enforce the default ownership for the sudoers file
